name: Jim Banks
promises: Secure the Border: Jim is a strong and vocal advocate for securing our border by implementing the successful policies of the Trump administration, including building a physical barrier along the southern border and reinstating the 'Remain in Mexico' program, where migrants must wait in Mexico before their asylum claims can be heard in the United States.

Defend Life: Jim has always championed the unborn and uses his voice for the voiceless to protect them from the violence of abortion. Jim will continue to fight to ensure the radical abortion group Planned Parenthood does not receive a dime of our tax dollars and will vote for federal judges and justices who respect the Constitution, especially the precious right to life.
Support Our Veterans: In the Senate, Jim always works to improve care and resources for veterans to honor their service and sacrifice.

Prioritize National Defense: Jim prioritizes our service members' ability to defend the nation against potential threats – while also being as fiscally responsible as possible. Jim will always fight for a national security policy that puts America first.

Oppose Wokeness in Schools and Sports: Jim is staunchly opposed to Critical Race Theory and other liberal propaganda, like the 1619 Project, being pushed onto elementary school children at the cost of basic subjects like reading and math. In the Senate, Jim stands up for common sense and that includes keeping boys out of girls' sports.
Unleash the American Economy: Jim is committed to supporting pro-growth policies like those that have produced record low unemployment and the strongest wage growth in decades.
Stop Reckless Spending and Reduce the National Debt: Jim believes we must act urgently to get our country's fiscal house in order.
Secure Our Elections: Ensuring election integrity has been a top priority for Jim with the clear goal of making it easy to vote and harder to cheat.
Back the Blue: Jim is a proud supporter of law enforcement and first responders in Indiana and across the country. In the Senate, Jim always back the blue.
Stand With Our Ally Israel: Jim Banks believes the United States has a moral obligation to protect Israel and that doing so is firmly in our national interest.

name: John Curtis
promises: John has transferred more federal land to Utah than anyone else in state history. John has protected land access for farmers and ranchers whose livelihoods depend on it. In the Senate, John will continue to protect Utah land from outside intrusion and federal overreach.

John is a leader in Congress on U.S.-China policy. He speaks Mandarin and knows the Chinese culture. His Taipei Act is the biggest step taken to counter China since Ronald Reagan. In the Senate, John will continue to stand up to communist China's aggression.

John has visited the border three times and has witnessed the inhumane conditions of those who have been falsely promised the American dream by the Biden Administration. John is committed to stopping the cartels' deadly flow of fentanyl, human trafficking, and illegal immigrants into the U.S. In the Senate, John will work to secure the border and fix our broken immigration system.

John has done more to support U.S. oil and gas than any other member of Congress. John is fighting to make the U.S. not just energy independent, but energy dominant. In the Senate, John will push for a tariff on China, forcing them to pay for their pollution and level the playing field for Utah businesses that are doing things the right way.
John is a pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, fiscal conservative who is committed to cutting Biden's reckless spending. In the U.S. Senate, John will continue to stand by these Utah values.

Business and innovation are key to future economic growth. Digital assets and crypto currency both play an important role. John has been proud to support these industries in Congress, and will continue to work hard to make sure those in Silicon Slopes and throughout Utah have the certainty from the government they need. He will continue this critical work in the Senate.

name: Dave McCormick
promises: INFLATION & THE ECONOMY: In the Senate he'll work to rein in government spending, oppose tax increases, and exercise fiscal responsibility to lessen the burden on the people of the commonwealth.
SECURING OUR BORDER: As Senator, Dave will fight to secure the border, put an end to drug and human trafficking, and support our border patrol agents with the resources they need to do their jobs.

AMERICA ON THE WORLD STAGE: As Senator, he'll work to restore America's military might, strengthen our defense industrial base, reestablish deterrence of our adversaries, and make sure the world knows we're not planning to relinquish our superpower status anytime soon.
STOPPING VIOLENT CRIME: Dave believes every American deserves to feel safe where they live and work.

GROWING PENNSYLVANIA'S ENERGY SECTOR: Dave is a conservationist who believes we don't have to choose between clean energy and economic development. America must be energy independent — it's good for our economy and our national security.

EDUCATING PENNSYLVANIA'S CHILDREN: Dave has a plan to revamp our education system with a talent strategy that revives and unlocks the courageous, entrepreneurial American spirit. This starts by improving the quality of our schools by expanding school choice, committing to free expression, and valuing civics and the formation of good citizens.

PREVENTING FENTANYL FROM RAVAGING COMMUNITIES: He believes the federal government needs to go after the suppliers and traffickers that produce and bring fentanyl into the United States and sanction the financial flows that facilitate it.

HARNESSING AMERICAN INNOVATION: Today, we need to re-energize innovation, including through improving education in math, science, and engineering as well as technical skills training, and driving technological and data leadership.

ENDING CHINA'S FREE REIN: Dave introduced a plan to fortify American military and economic strength, thwart China's aggressive ambitions and protect the homeland through six bans to end China's free ride.
SUPPORTING PENNSYLVANIA'S VETERANS: Dave will work to connect veterans with job opportunities in the private and public sector to help them succeed following their service to our country.
ELECTION INTEGRITY: Every Pennsylvanian needs to be able to have faith and confidence in our elections.
ABORTION: Dave is pro-life, is opposed to a national abortion ban, and supports exceptions in the cases of rape, incest, and saving the life of the mother.
SECOND AMENDMENT: Dave is a strong supporter of the Second Amendment and believes law-abiding citizens have an individual right to own firearms.
CRYPTO: American leadership on blockchain and crypto is critical to our economic and national security.
STANDING UP FOR AMERICAN VALUES: Dave is a fierce defender of our values, and believes the progressive left is embracing an ideology that is undermining the basic tenets of our democracy.

THE WAYS OF WASHINGTON: Dave supports term limits and will not serve more than two terms in the Senate if elected. Dave also believes in protecting the integrity of the Senate through preserving the filibuster.

name: Bernie Moreno
notes: Moreno's campaign website (berniemoreno.com) does not feature a standalone issues page with labeled promises. Based on publicly documented campaign materials and the campaign's 'About' page, the following priorities were stated on berniemoreno.com:
promises: Massively reduce anti-growth regulations, cut government spending, and end inflation.
Secure the border and deport anyone here illegally.
Support building a wall along our Southern border and eliminating taxpayer-funded benefits that serve as a magnet for illegal immigrants.
Unleash American energy: support using coal, oil, and extracted natural gas, as well as building more nuclear plants.
Stop the Chinese Communist Party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.
Fight the rising cost of living and bring down energy prices.
In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.
Support blockchain and cryptocurrency as a driver of American economic leadership.

name: Tim Sheehy
notes: Sheehy's campaign website (timformt.com) did not maintain a stable issues page at the time of this research. The following are campaign priorities documented from the website and contemporaneous reporting of website content:
promises: Secure border: Seal the southern border, complete Trump's wall, and stop the flow of fentanyl and human trafficking.
Safe streets: Support law enforcement, be tough on crime.
Cheap gas: Pursue American energy dominance including fossil fuels, while supporting an all-of-the-above energy strategy.
Protect public lands: Public lands belong in public hands; protect rights to hunt, fish, and recreate, and ensure more local collaboration and input.
Oppose wokeness: Keep biological males out of women's sports and oppose radical gender ideology in schools.
Protect life: Strongly pro-life while also in strong support of IVF.
Cut government: Cut the federal budget by shrinking the executive branch, including potentially eliminating the U.S. Department of Education.
Support parents' rights: Parents—not government—should direct their children's education.
Prioritize national defense: Invest in a strong military with warfighters ready to meet today's threats.
Bring accountability to D.C.: Stop career politicians from talking a big game while doing nothing.

name: Elissa Slotkin
promises: Protecting America's democracy is the ultimate kitchen table issue – because every other issue depends on a vibrant and resilient democracy. Elissa has made defending and expanding voting rights, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and women's rights a priority in her time in public office.
In order to preserve our democracy, we must also reform the very political system we use to elect our leaders. Elissa is proud to have never taken a dime of corporate PAC money – not ever.

Elissa believes that we need to make more critical items in America, so that we are in control of our own economic security. In the Senate, Elissa will work every day to bring critical supply chains and manufacturing back home.

Elissa is a big believer in protecting and expanding Michigan's middle class. That means addressing the things Michiganders talk about every night at the kitchen table: their pocketbooks and their kids.

Elissa's national security background means she's focused on the things that are truly a threat to our kids. From physical safety to cybersecurity, she feels there is no higher responsibility than to protect the next generation.
Elissa has supported no-brainer gun safety measures to keep our communities safe, including safe storage of firearms, universal background checks, red flag laws, and the assault weapons ban.
Elissa believes all Americans should have access to healthcare they can afford, regardless of pre-existing conditions. No one should ever go broke because they happen to get sick.
Click here to hear Elissa talk about reforming the filibuster.
Click here to hear Elissa talk about protecting the right to choose.

name: Jon Husted
notes: Husted was appointed in January 2025 to fill the vacancy left by JD Vance. As an appointee, he did not run a traditional 2024 campaign. The following priorities are drawn from his Senate office communications and his 2026 campaign website:
promises: Making life easier and more affordable for Ohioans.
Expanding career technical education so more Ohio students have access to skills training and can graduate high school career-ready.
Pioneering job training programs like TechCred to provide every Ohioan with access to the credentials they need to earn good jobs.
Keeping Ohio communities safe by securing millions of dollars of funding for law enforcement and working in the U.S. Senate to secure the border.
Protecting women, girls, and their sports and giving law enforcement more tools to convict criminals who have helped flood Ohio communities with fentanyl.
Protecting children from online predators.
Defending the rights of women, children, and the unborn.
Requiring voters to provide photo ID as a condition of voting.

name: Ashley Moody
promises: Secure the Border and Uphold the Rule of Law: Finish the wall, reinstate policies that prevent illegal immigration, and crack down on human trafficking and drug smuggling. End sanctuary cities and put American workers first.

Lead the Next Era of Space Innovation: Expand America's leadership in space exploration, national defense, and commercial spaceflight. Strengthen investments in Florida's Space Coast and other key hubs, cut bureaucratic roadblocks, and ensure U.S. dominance in space technology.

Rebuild American Industry and Energy Production: Cut burdensome regulations, lower taxes, and bring critical manufacturing back home. Expand domestic energy production—oil, gas, nuclear, and next-generation technologies—to lower costs and make America energy independent.

Protect Families, Parental Rights, and American Values: Stop government overreach in education, defend free speech, gun rights, and religious liberty. Give parents more control over their children's education and push back against radical social agendas in schools.

Restore Fiscal Discipline and Stop Washington's Waste: Balance the budget, eliminate reckless government spending, and cut foreign aid that doesn't serve American interests. Hold Washington accountable and prioritize economic policies that put taxpayers first. Let DOGE examine every bit of our federal government.

Strengthen the Military and Defend American Sovereignty: Invest in the strongest, most advanced military in the world while avoiding endless wars. Stop funding global organizations that undermine U.S. interests and refocus national defense on protecting American borders and strategic assets.
